title: Porto's Commuter Train
description: This is a resource Pack for MTR mod that adds multiple versions and reskins for the EMU3400 used by Portugal's national Operator "CP - Comboios de Portugal" in Porto's Commuter Network
body:
This resource pack for the MTR mod introduces a variety of versions and reskins for the EMU3400, reflecting the designs used by Portugal's national operator, CP - Comboios de Portugal, on Porto's commuter network. Enhance your gameplay with authentic and detailed recreations of these iconic trains, bringing a touch of Portuguese rail transport to your virtual railway adventures.

**Vehicles included in the pack:**
- CP3400 (voxel)
- CP3400 (A-Train airport express)
- CP3400 (A-Train airport express mini)
- CP3400 (DB BR Class 423)
